===Pokémon competitions===
Cilan has competed in the following {{cat|Pokémon competitions}}:
* [[Club Battle]] - Top 8 (''[[BW041|The Club Battle Hearts of Fury: Emolga Versus Sawk!]]'')
* [[Eindoak Harvest Festival|Harvest Festival Battle Competition]] - {{tt|Unknown|Won 0 amulets}} (''[[M14|Pokémon the Movie: White—Victini and Zekrom, Black—Victini and Reshiram]]'')
* [[Subway Bosses' Stamp Rally]] - Winner{{tt|*|Erina gave Cilan her only stamp, thus allowing Cilan to win.}} (''[[BW051|Lost at the Stamp Rally!]]'')
* [[Wishing Bell Festival]] - 5th (''[[BW069|Climbing the Tower of Success!]]'')
* [[Clubsplosion]] - Top 8 (''[[BW072|A Clubsplosion of Excitement!]]'')
* [[Pokémon World Tournament Junior Cup]] - Top 4 (''[[BW091|Battling Authority Once Again!]]'')
* [[Pokémon Sumo Tournament]] - Top 16 (''[[BW134|The Journalist from Another Region!]]'')
